title: The Night the Music Stopped

scenes.text: A music legend vanished without a trace, leaving behind a mystery.
It happened in Las Vegas, at the Flamingo Hotel.
In 1981, famous singer and performer, Jimmy Hoffa, disappeared without a clue.
Hoffa's legacy lives on, but his fate remains unknown.
Despite numerous theories, no evidence has ever surfaced.
scenes.label: NO EVIDENCE FOUND

scenes.text: Follow for daily true crime mysteries.

description: 📍 Las Vegas, USA - 1981. A legendary singer mysteriously disappeared, leaving only questions behind. Follow for daily cold cases!
